character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Involved in the events, helped with the story.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Involved in the events, his money-bag was taken.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Dance
character_dossiers.biography: A revenue officer involved in the incident with Master Pew.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A landowner and squire, involved in the events with Mr. Dance and Dr. Livesey.

character_dossiers.name: Master Pew
character_dossiers.biography: Killed by the horses during the incident.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Saved by the narrator and Mr. Dance.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator and participant in the events.

character_dossiers.name: the supervisor
character_dossiers.biography: A revenue officer involved in the incident with Master Pew.
